subcodes.first_line: O thou salamander, aflame in the fire of God's love! By God, verily, the denizens of the Most Glorious Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها السمندر المتوقد فی نار محبه الله تالله الحق ان سکان الملکوت الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for protection
